purpose: Pair-quality xuan-inspired public-state taker BUY shadow candidate. This version tightens l1_immediate_pair from 0.98 to 0.97 to reduce residual exposure while preserving high market coverage. Shadow/research only.

source_research.data_policy: full rebuilt 2026-04-27 cache plus rebuilt 2026-04-28..2026-05-01 cache; old 23-market 2026-04-27 cache excluded
source_research.reason_selected: Compared with l1<=0.98, l1<=0.97 sacrifices nominal PnL/coverage but cuts residuals from 14 to 1 and improves worst-residual+100bps from +1369.43 to +1866.01.

execution_model.first_side_gate: must equal current L1 high-side by midpoint
execution_model.first_leg_cost_model: CLOB REST L2 ask sweep VWAP for clip_size
execution_model.completion_cost_model: opposite CLOB REST L2 ask sweep VWAP for clip_size during completion_window_s, with pair-quality ceiling 0.98

shadow_required_observations: Live public WS trigger rate under l1_immediate_pair<=0.97
CLOB REST L2 latency and first-leg full-clip availability
Whether price window 0.45-0.75 misses meaningful live regimes outside the backtested envelope
